FUTURE ARCHITECTURE

Enterprise Software
is Being Rewritten.

We eliminate your operational boundaries with cloud computing, AI, and low-code platforms. Meet the modern financial ecosystem.

cloud_done

S/4HANA Cloud

An intelligent and flexible cloud ERP platform breaking speed limits with next-generation in-memory database architecture.

Details arrow_right_alt
smart_toy

Joule (SAP AI)

SAP's language model integrated into corporate processes. Retrieve reports and receive analysis in seconds using natural language commands.

Details arrow_right_alt
api

SAP BTP

Write integrations, perform data mining, and develop custom applications for your business without touching the ERP core using the Business Technology Platform.

Discover Platform arrow_right_alt
insights

SAP Signavio

A cloud-based process transformation suite. Identify operational blind spots, design, and continuously improve your processes.

View Analysis arrow_right_alt
build_circle

SAP Build

Low-code/no-code architecture. Enables even non-coding professionals to quickly create automations for their departmental needs.

Details arrow_right_alt
memory

AI Agents

The era of autonomous corporate AI agents that read and record invoices automatically and resolve reconciliation issues on their own is beginning.

Examine the Future arrow_right_alt
format_quote

05 · SAP AI & JOULE

"AI in enterprise software has moved beyond the pilot phase. SAP Joule, integrated across S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, Ariba, and BTP, represents a generative AI layer that understands business context, not just language. The practical results are tangible: invoice matching that handles exceptions autonomously, payment delay prediction that triggers preventive action before disputes arise, and financial closing processes that flag variances in real-time. Agentic AI takes this further — complex, multi-step workflows that previously required human coordination can now operate autonomously within defined guardrails. BTP AI Foundation provides organizations with the infrastructure to develop corporate AI solutions on their own SAP data without exposing sensitive financial information to external models. Companies gaining a competitive advantage from AI are not those trying it — they are those who have structured their data architecture to make AI truly useful. eny positions every implementation with this horizon in mind."

architecture

eny Platform Vision

Architectural Perspective
format_quote

07 · SAP BTP

"The corporate technology stack has moved beyond what any single vendor can fully provide. Organizations operate SAP alongside Salesforce, Workday, legacy systems, and dozens of point solutions — the cost of keeping these synchronized is one of IT's largest hidden expenses. SAP Business Technology Platform provides the integration, extensibility, and data orchestration layer that makes a heterogeneous environment manageable. Integration Suite connects SAP and non-SAP systems through ready-made adapters and API management; it eliminates custom point-to-point integrations that accumulate technical debt. SAP Build accelerates development with low-code tools — allowing finance and operations teams to automate processes without waiting for IT backlogs. The platform's AI Foundation layer allows organizations to build enterprise intelligence on their own data. For eny, BTP is not a technical add-on — it's the connective tissue of modern SAP architecture; every implementation we design considers how this platform will evolve over time."

architecture

eny Platform Vision

Architectural Perspective
